query:
-- Insert SmileTel Lite User License (Common Phone non-MC variant: Buy $3.90, Sell $9.00)
INSERT INTO supplier_product_cost_map (supplier, productName, wholesaleCost, defaultRetailPrice, rrp, notes, source)
VALUES ('SasBoss', 'SmileTel Lite User License', 3.90, 9.00, 9.00,
  'Common Phone non-MC variant: Buy $3.90, Sell $9.00 (Access4 pricebook)', 'Access4 Pricebook 2026');

-- Now fix services using these products
-- MC - SmileTel Lite User License: $3.90/seat
UPDATE services SET monthlyCost=3.90, costSource='product_map'
WHERE planName='MC - SmileTel Lite User License';

-- SmileTel Lite user / SmileTel Lite User: $6.00/seat
UPDATE services SET monthlyCost=6.00, costSource='product_map'
WHERE planName IN ('SmileTel Lite user', 'SmileTel Lite User', 'UCXcel Lite');

-- SmileTel Professional User License: $18.00/seat (Executive User - Included Calls)
UPDATE services SET monthlyCost=18.00, costSource='product_map'
WHERE planName='SmileTel Professional User License';

-- MC - SmileTel Premium User License: $19.34/seat
UPDATE services SET monthlyCost=19.34, costSource='product_map'
WHERE planName='MC - SmileTel Premium User License';

-- SmileTel Essential user: $9.00/seat (already correct, but update costSource)
UPDATE services SET monthlyCost=9.00, costSource='product_map'
WHERE planName IN ('SmileTel Essential user', 'SmileTel Essential User', 'UCXcel Essential');

-- Business Trunk (PAYG): $2.00/trunk
UPDATE services SET monthlyCost=2.00, costSource='product_map'
WHERE planName='Business Trunk (PAYG)';

-- SmileTel Lite User License (non-MC Common Phone): $3.90/seat
UPDATE services SET monthlyCost=3.90, costSource='product_map'
WHERE planName='SmileTel Lite User License';

-- Verify counts
SELECT planName, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(monthlyCost) as total, MIN(monthlyCost) as minCost, MAX(monthlyCost) as maxCost
FROM services
WHERE planName IN (
  'MC - SmileTel Lite User License', 'SmileTel Lite user', 'SmileTel Lite User',
  'UCXcel Lite', 'SmileTel Professional User License', 'MC - SmileTel Premium User License',
  'SmileTel Essential user', 'SmileTel Essential User', 'UCXcel Essential',
  'Business Trunk (PAYG)', 'SmileTel Lite User License'
)
GROUP BY planName ORDER BY planName;
